summary: Ralph Iteration 2: Code Quality & Performance Optimization - Focused on making the project "better" as requested. Removed debug console.log. Fixed dark mode useEffect dependency array bug. Extracted inline styles (90+ lines) to reusable CSS classes for better maintainability. Improved error handling UX with error banners instead of alert() and console.error(). Added comprehensive accessibility features with ARIA labels, roles, and semantic HTML. Optimized performance with useMemo for filtered locations and categories. Bundle size stable at ~28KB (gzip).
improvements: Removed debug console.log statement from App.tsx
Fixed dark mode useEffect bug - added darkMode to dependency array for proper state synchronization
Extracted 90+ lines of inline styles to CSS classes (.search-input, .sort-buttons, .sort-button, .error-banner)
Improved error handling UX - replaced alert() with styled error banner with auto-dismiss
- aria-label and aria-expanded on sidebar toggle
- aria-expanded and aria-haspopup on city selector
- aria-pressed on toggle buttons (stroller filter, facility filters)
- aria-label on facility filter buttons with context
Optimized LocationList component with useMemo for filtered locations
Memoized categories array in App component with useMemo
Added keyboard accessibility improvements and better focus management
Build passes with no errors or TypeScript warnings

test_summary.code_quality: TypeScript strict mode compliance, removed debug statements
test_summary.feature_coverage: All P0/P1 features complete, improved UX and accessibility

✓ Bilingual support with bilingual error messages (P0)
